subject: docs: capture deferred PWA items in TODO + add test scenarios
body:
Wrap pass from session meta-sweep found two doc gaps:
- TESTING_GUIDE.md had no scenarios for the three new PWA behaviors
  (visibility-paused polling, icon cache-bust cycle, install-modal
  disclosure). Added three numbered scenarios continuing the existing
  numbering + format.
- TODO.md wasn't tracking the two items I deferred during the branch
  audits: the injector script fixture test (from cold pass) and the
  remaining edges + a11y trigger passes (from session pwa pass).
  These existed only in session-notes prose; tracking them in TODO
  so they surface when the next person looks for work.

Tags: documentation, testing, todo
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-polish
Semver: patch
title: capture deferred PWA items in TODO + add test scenarios
